item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: A Puckett family birthday
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett
Back in July I adopted Nanna from Nashville Humane - a 15 year old blind dog with terminal heart disease and a long list of other health problems. I'm happy to report that not only is she still alive and doing amazing, but...
Today is Nanna's 16th birthday ＼(°o°)／
When she first came home I didn't think she'd be alive for 6 months. Her arthritis was so bad she could barely stand up. 7 months later and she's walking 10 miles a week, most of her hair has grown back, and she's getting a little more cuddly every week.
It's been an amazing transformation for a dog that just needed a reason to fight again.
With her birthday we start Puckett Week - 7 days of fundraising and a Supply Drive for domestic violence survivors facing homelessness. Last year we raised over $30,000 worth of donations and goods right here on Imgur.
The Mary Parrish Center offers free housing to survivors who are either homeless or would be homeless once leaving their abuser. Domestic violence is the leading cause of homelessness for women and children in America.
Many survivors face the difficult decision of staying in an abusive relationship or taking their children to a homeless shelter. In addition to offering free apartments, they also furnish the place, provide food, job assistance, therapy and even emergency financial assistance. Everything a survivor needs to stay safe and start their life fresh again.
You'll see me posting about this every day this week trying to promote the Supply Drive and fundraiser. For Nanna's 16th birthday, I thought it would be nice for anyone who can afford it to donate $16 to the Mary Parrish Center.
Alone we can feel unable to help or make a difference, but together we have always done amazing things. Let's do some more amazing things this week Happy birthday Nanna Pants, this one's for you. ... To donate $16 - https://www.maryparrish.org/donate ... If you'd like to send goods to the survivors of domestic violence at Mary Parrish - https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/3USHUHIVSINQE?ref_=wl_share ... Thank you for reading my post, I'll see everyone again tomorrow.
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: I'm still buzzed from the halftime show! WEST SIDE!
item.description:
I'm 38, and my 10yr old son definitely enjoyed watching his mom and dad jamming tf out
Just GOAT things
Hip Hop royalty
Accurate.
So everybody, just follow me! Cause we need a little controversy, cause it feels so empty WITHOUT ME
No hate on 50, a little lighthearted jokes but it's all in good fun. Full disclosure, I weigh 45lbs more than I did 10yrs ago
Snoop can pull off anything lol
For real tho, god DAMN Mary J!
item.dc:creator: CrazyDreams

item.title: Happy Valentine's Day From Jewel Staite (and me!)
item.description: Hi everyone! I just wanted to say thank you all for keeping imgur an awesome place to hang out and relax. You are all great people. Here's a Valentine's Day wish from Jewel Staite for all of you: https://www.cameo.com/recipient/620a2249133ac5cf23adaeb4 I hope you all have a great day! Many thanks to the awesome Jewel herself and Cameo for making this happen. Edit: And if you have not already seen it, please go see the Valentine's wish from Ksenia Solo: https://imgur.com/gallery/7A7Yor9
item.dc:creator: BinaryGrapes

item.title: Day 262: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: The French Canadian Double Beef Patty, American Cheese, Stack Sauce, Streaky Bacon, Blue Cheese, Garlic Butter, Chilli-Maple Syrup, Hashbrown From MEAT:STACK In Newcastle, United Kingdom Previous Day 261: https://imgur.com/gallery/q5j3kkw MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD Happy Valentine's Day imgur!

item.title: 5 years restoring a formerly vacant 1927 Detroit home. The inside of the home was complete in 2018 and now we have moved to the exterior of the property with the build of a new garage and sunroom that are period appropriate for the 1920s.
item.description:
Exterior before view our entire story at www.between6and7.com
Exterior after restoration of original windows, new landscaping and new paint
Kitchen and breakfast nook before
Kitchen and breakfast nook after
Before
During
After
Dining before
Dining after
Stairs before
Stairs after
Master bedroom before
Master bedroom after
Bedroom converted into master bath
Bedroom converted into master bath
Kitchen before
Kitchen after
Guest bath before
Bath after
Living room before
Living room after
Powder room before
Powder room after
Beginning guild of sunroom
Sunroom framing
Garage is framed and sunroom framing began
The plan
Leaded windows being installed in sunroom
Leaded windows being installed in sunroom
Leaded windows being installed in sunroom
Beadboard Install in garage
Electrical rough in sunroom
Insulation day
Insulation day
Beadboard garage install
Beadboard garage install
Beadboard garage install
Window install complete
Window install compelte
Skylight install
Skylight install
Skylight install
Skylight install
We still have a long way to go! I post our progress on Instagram @between6and7 and keep a construction diary at www.between6and7.com
item.dc:creator: Mopedgirl

item.title: I don't have a girlfriend so here's my 1973 pocket calculator (featuring 1000FPS slomo)
item.description:
Texas Instruments Datamath. Effectively the first pocket calculator.
50 year old peelies
Pi² at 1000fps on the nixie tube LED screen. What you are watching is the logic actually flowing through logic gates until it flows through them all and settles on the answer.
Pi² at real time speed. I used to think calculators had a chip that stored all the answers on it so I used to try to come up with math questions I didn't think they would expect.
Valentine's Day tax
item.dc:creator: BaklavaWearingBalaclavaWhilePlayingBalalaikaOnBlackLava
